settings.title: Description
settings.content: Meet Boost & Bloom, your scalp's new best friend. This 15ml micro-needling hair booster serum combines the power of targeted delivery with a built-in roller-ball applicator — designed to stimulate the scalp while channelling actives deep into the hair follicle. Unlike regular serums that sit on the surface, Boost & Bloom works at the source. The stainless steel roller tip gently primes the scalp, improving absorption so every drop counts. Whether you're dealing with thinning, slow growth, or a scalp that needs waking up — this serum is built to deliver results you can actually see. Compact, travel-friendly, and clinical-grade. 15ml of concentrated care in one sleek pen.

settings.title: Shipping & return
settings.content: Free shipping on all orders over £40. Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. 30-day hassle-free returns.

settings.title: Chlorine Test
settings.content: Our formula is clinically tested to remain stable and active even in environments with hard water and chlorine residues.

settings.heading: Hair fall isn't about weak hair. It's a lazy scalp.
settings.quote_text: "You're applying oils, serums, and treatments — but nothing is actually reaching where growth begins."
settings.alert_text: The fix isn't a better serum. It's getting actives to where growth actually starts — deep in the follicle.

settings.description: Actives penetrate beyond the surface level — unlike normal serums that sit on top and wash away.

settings.question: How quickly will I see results?
settings.answer: Most customers report noticeable reduction in shedding within 2 weeks. Visible new growth typically appears within 4–8 weeks of consistent daily use.

settings.question: How do I apply the serum correctly?
settings.answer: Apply 8–10 drops directly to the scalp on damp (not wet) hair. Massage in circular motions for 2 minutes. No rinse needed — style as normal.

settings.question: Is Boost & Bloom suitable for men and women?
settings.answer: Yes. Our formula is designed for both men and women experiencing any type of hair thinning, including androgenetic alopecia, telogen effluvium, and stress-related loss.

settings.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not happy with your results, contact us for a full refund — no questions asked.

settings.question: How long does one bottle last?
settings.answer: One 50ml bottle lasts approximately 4–6 weeks with daily use (8–10 drops per application). We recommend subscribing for uninterrupted results.

settings.subheading: Hear from some of our amazing customers who are building faster.
settings.heading: Listen to what our customers Say

settings.name: Priya M
settings.text: I was honestly skeptical because I've tried so many serums that did absolutely nothing. But after about 3 weeks of using Boost & Bloom consistently, I started noticing these tiny baby hairs along my hairline. I've never had that before. The roller tip feels really satisfying to use too, almost like a mini scalp massage every morning.

settings.name: Karthik R
settings.text: My hair has been thinning since my early 20s and I'd kind of just accepted it. My sister got me this as a birthday gift and I didn't expect much honestly. Two months in and my barber actually asked me what I've been doing differently. That was the moment I knew it was working.

settings.name: Ananya S
settings.text: Post-pregnancy hair fall was brutal for me. I tried everything, oils, supplements, the works. Boost & Bloom is the only thing that's felt like it actually does something. I love that the applicator means I'm not wasting product, it goes exactly where it needs to go. Will 100% repurchase.

settings.name: Divya K
settings.text: I was nervous about the microneedling part but it doesn't hurt at all, it's more like a light tingle. I use it every other night before bed and my scalp feels so much healthier. Less flakiness and itching after the shower. Three weeks in and I'm not stopping anytime soon.
